_description: Output has both a blocking issue (unsupported claim) and an escalation issue (escalation_required=True). Status priority rule: blocking always wins. Must block, not escalate.

input.summary: A zero-day exploit in critical infrastructure software allows unauthenticated remote access.

citations.excerpt: Unpatched systems are actively being exploited in the wild.

unsupported_claims: Exploit has caused confirmed fatalities — not grounded in evidence
